title: Leek Kogomi Casserole
description: A smoky and dense Japanese dish featuring leeks that is keto-friendly and perfect for a cozy dinner.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup almond flour or keto flour
Optional toppings: cheese, avocado, cherry tomatoes
ingredients.notes: Can be added for extra flavor

instructions: In a large skillet, cook ground beef over medium heat until browned.
Add sliced leeks and continue cooking until they soften slightly. Season with salt and pepper.
Stir in almond flour or keto flour for extra texture. Mix well to prevent clumping.
Pour the mixture into a casserole dish that has been greased (optional).
Beat eggs, then pour them on top of the ground beef and leeks.
Bake in preheated oven for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown on top and cooked through.
Serve hot with optional toppings if desired.
